PETITION FILED BY PETITIONER BROWN JR, WILLIAM JACKSON BROWN JR, WILLIAM JACKSON NIDUAZA, GARY DOBESH, KIM AS TO RESPONDENT STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTO INSURANCE COMPANY
COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROWN JR, WILLIAM JACKSON NIDUAZA, GARY DOBESH, KIM
MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-06-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFFS WILLIAM BROWN, GARY NIDUAZA AND KIM DOBESH'S MOTION TO COMPEL IS GRANTED. THE COURT NOMINATES THE FOLLOWING INDIVIDUALS AS ARBITRATORS FROM THE COURT'S LIST OF ARBITRATORS: (1) NEIL BARDACK; (2) SUSAN KEENEY; (3) DENNIS ISAAC; (4) NANCY E. HUDGINS; (5) JAMES HANNAWALT. THE PARTIES ARE TO MEET AND CONFER TO DETERMINE WHETHER THEY CAN DECIDE ON AN ARBITRATOR IN COMPLIANCE WITH CCP 1281.6. IF THE PARTIES CANNOT AGREE WITHIN THE 5-DAY PERIOD OF CCP 1281.6, THEN PETITIONER MAY MAKE AN EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR THE APPOINTMENT OF AN ARBITRATOR. THE COURT WILL NOT SET A DEADLINE FOR THE ARBITRATION TO BE COMPLETE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: TONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFFS WILLIAM BROWN, GARY NIDUAZA, AND KIM DOBESH'S MOTION TO COMPEL IS CONTINUED TO JANUARY 8, 2014 TO GIVE BOTH PARTIES THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B AND 2.6C. PETITIONERS MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE PETITION AND ALL MOVING PAPERS AND RESPONDENT MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF ITS OPPOSITION TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN DECEMBER 6, 2013 AT 4:00 PM. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Compel
Off Calendar Jan-08-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: STEVEN MCHUGH, ESQ., 530.544.3006, FOR PETITIONERS WILLIAM BROWN, GARY NIDUAZA AND KIM DOBESH.
GREGORY DOYLE, ESQ., 510.835.3400, FOR RESPONDENT STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTO INSURANCE COMPANY.

RULING: DISCUSSED and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: PLAINTIFFS WILLIAM BROWN, GARY NIDUAZA AND KIM DOBESH'S Motion To Compel is granted. The Court nominates the following individuals as arbitrators from the Court's list of arbitrators: (1) Neil Bardack; (2) Susan Keeney; (3) Dennis Isaac; (4) Nancy E. Hudgins; (5) James Hannawalt. The parties are to meet and confer to determine whether they can decide on an arbitrator in compliance with CCP 1281.6. If the parties cannot agree within the 5-day period of CCP 1281.6, then petitioner may make an ex parte application for the appointment of an arbitrator. The Court will not set a deadline for the arbitration to be complete. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Tony Vaughn, CSR #6185

Notice Of Motion To Compel
Off Calendar Dec-06-2013 Continued To Jan-08-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFFS WILLIAM BROWN, GARY NIDUAZA, and KIM DOBESH'S Motion To Compel IS Continued to January 8, 2014 to give both parties the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B and 2.6C. Petitioners must deliver courtesy copies of the petition and all moving papers and Respondent must deliver courtesy copies of its opposition to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than December 6, 2013 at 4:00 pm. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185
